title: Der Mörder Dimitri Karamasoff
writer: Fyodor Dostoevsky, Erich Engels, Leonhard Frank
actors: Fritz Kortner, Anna Sten, Fritz Rasp
plot: Suspicion surrounds a lieutenant for killing his father: Dimitri asks his father for his heritage. The father says he wants to marry young Grushenka. Dimitri tries to talk the girl out of that plan and is himself totally smitten w...
